data: {"generalSituation":"The weather will be generally fine over the coast of Guangdong today. A trough of low pressure is expected to develop gradually over central China on Monday and edge closer to the coastal areas of southern China in the following couple of days, bringing showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. The northeast monsoon will affect southern China in the middle and latter parts of this week.
